label: Clerk Authentication Starter
description: Drop-in user authentication with Clerk: sign-in, sign-up, session, organizations, and middleware-based route protection.
summary: Adds full user authentication to a Next.js App Router app via Clerk. LLM should use this when the user wants login/signup, protected routes, user profiles, or multi-tenant organizations. Includes ClerkProvider in root layout, middleware for route protection, and a protected API route example. Sign-in/up pages are drop-in components from @clerk/nextjs.

envVars.purpose: Server-only Clerk API key. Get from dashboard.clerk.com after creating a free account. Never expose client-side.
Client-safe Clerk publishable key. Used by ClerkProvider to initialize the SDK in browser.
Path to sign-in page (default '/sign-in'). Must match the route file under app/sign-in/[[...sign-in]]/page.tsx.
Where to redirect after successful sign-in (default '/dashboard'). Adjust to match the user's main app entry.
Where to redirect after successful sign-up (default '/dashboard'). Often same as sign-in redirect.
